topics.title: Prank Calls and Studio Rivalries
topics.summary: The studio plays several prank calls involving fake identities, a mock-up of a telepsychic hotline, and an interaction with a caller claiming to have a new career.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment and Guest Previews
topics.summary: The studio prepares for a trivia competition between porn stars and local personalities while discussing upcoming guest appearances, industry rumors, and internal production details.

topics.title: Media Ethics and Celebrity Controversy
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the ethics of media exposure for trauma victims, the impact of celebrity status on personal choices, and the role of professional oversight in public discourse.

topics.title: Parental Monitoring and Pornography Industry Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores the ethics of parents monitoring children's online activity for safety before transitioning into a discussion with Ron Jeremy regarding his career in the adult film industry.

topics.title: Unauthorized Pornographic Film Production
topics.summary: The studio explores a dispute regarding an unauthorized adult film shot in Howard Stern's studio and the subsequent claims made by Ron Jeremy in his memoir.

topics.title: Controversy Over Unauthorized Studio Filming
topics.summary: The studio features a heated confrontation regarding an unauthorized adult film shot in Howard Stern's studio, involving allegations of deception, broken trust, and the details surrounding its production.

topics.title: Ron Jeremy Book Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features Ron Jeremy discussing his new book, personal anecdotes about celebrities like Kathy Griffin and Tracy Lords, and a humorous segment regarding the rules of a fan contest.

topics.title: Porn Stars vs. Slow Adults Competition
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition between local residents and porn stars, featuring interviews with performers regarding their careers, personal lives, and experiences in the adult film industry.

topics.title: Trivia Competition Between Porn Stars and Slow Adults
topics.summary: The studio hosts a trivia competition between porn stars and a group of "slow adults" featuring questions on spelling, geography, and basic math.

topics.title: Trivia Game and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio hosts a trivia game with guests, featuring musical performances, promotional segments for adult film stars, and discussions regarding substance use.

topics.title: Miss Howard Stern Segment
topics.summary: The show features a segment where the titleholder of Miss Howard Stern performs a series of challenges, including walking in a straight line and counting backward, before concluding her tenure.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Updates
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including R. Kelly's medical emergency, the removal of a Super Bowl advertisement, legal issues involving Gary Glitter, and various celebrity scandals.

topics.title: Trade School Misconduct and Legal News
topics.summary: The show covers a series of reports including sexual misconduct at a trade school, an astronaut's legal troubles, Walmart's gender pay discrimination lawsuit, and the disappearance of billions in cash sent to Iraq.

topics.title: War on Terrorism Tax and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers Senator Joseph Lieberman's proposal for a terrorism tax, reports on an illegal immigrant found in a car dashboard, discusses the release of Windows Vista, and features various entertainment news segments including celebrity interviews and upcoming comedy tour dates.
